step: FULL SWEEP COMPLETE — Phase D (Gate 1 verdict + §15E.7-vs-§15F-LSTM-NEGATIVE choice + docs) is the human reviewer's
status: COMPLETE — full sweep ran to completion in 6h 14m. 3/6 configs pass G1.1 descriptively (C1, C4, C6). C4 has lowest best_val_loss (0.2306). All 6 pass G1.2. All 6 fail G1.3 sub-thresholds but test_recon_unimodal=True for all. No gate1_report.json written (Phase C). No commits (Phase D).

c3.note: highest max_grad_norm in sweep (262 — still 4× below the 1e3 G1.2 floor)

c4.note: BEST val_loss in sweep at 0.2306; doubled width gave the most capacity; 27 epochs is fewer due to slower per-epoch (~137s) but quality dominated quantity

c5.note: recurrent_dropout doubled per-epoch wall time (~195s vs C1's 93s) — only 20 epochs fit in cap, insufficient for convergence

c6.note: structurally identical to C1; reached val_loss 0.2590 (slightly better than C1's 0.2684) due to RNG-state difference from sweep ordering

summary_observations_descriptive_only.G1_1_pass_count: 3 of 6 configs (C1, C4, C6 — all wider/baseline architectures with full LR)
G1_1_fail_modes: C2 (half LR, 0.5×): convergence too slow — 0.331 vs 0.298 threshold
C5 (recurrent_dropout=0.1): per-epoch slowdown ate the budget — only 20 epochs reached
summary_observations_descriptive_only.G1_2_pass_count: 6 of 6 — all max grad norms well below 1e3 floor; highest observed 262 (C3)
summary_observations_descriptive_only.G1_3_pass_count: 0 of 6 — but test_recon_unimodal=True for ALL configs; failure is on std/mean and max/mean sub-thresholds
summary_observations_descriptive_only.G1_3_failure_locus: test_recon_std_over_mean range 12-15 (limit was [0.1, 5.0]); test_recon_max_over_mean range 2482-3170 (limit was 100)
summary_observations_descriptive_only.G1_3_design_consideration: the test set is 854K attacks vs 38K benigns. Attack reconstructions are by design large (that is what makes the AE/LSTM-AE work as anomaly detectors). The G1.3 std/mean and max/mean thresholds were calibrated against benign-only-shaped distributions but applied to attack-dominated test data. Phase C call: whether to evaluate G1.3 on benign-val instead, or to revise the G1.3 sub-thresholds for mixed test data, or to accept this as a discoverable plan-design quirk.
summary_observations_descriptive_only.best_overall_config: C4 (128/64, lr=1e-3) with best_val_loss=0.2306. C4 also has lowest val_recon_p99 (0.945). Doubled width is the strongest architecture in this sweep.
summary_observations_descriptive_only.AE_reference_comparison: AE val_loss=0.1988 at 36 epochs (Phase 5). C4 val_loss=0.2306 at 27 epochs (cap-bound). Gap: 16% above AE; same compute budget (~3700s vs AE's equivalent). C4 likely converges further with more time — at cap, val_loss was still descending.
